project_type: React SPA with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Zustand state management
build_system: Vite - output to dist/ for Netlify deployment
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to ensure production build succeeds. 2. Check dist/ directory exists with index.html. 3. Verify TypeScript compiles without errors.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/study 2. nvm use 22 3. npm install 4. npm run dev (for development) 5. npm run build (for production)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - all packages installable freely. Node.js v22 via nvm. Deploy target: Netlify with SPA redirects.
contribution_requirements: Standard Vite React project structure. Mobile-first design. Local-first with localStorage persistence via Zustand.
key_patterns: Zustand stores with persist middleware for state. shadcn/ui for components. @dnd-kit for drag-drop. TanStack Table for list views. Modular feature-based directory structure.
directory_structure: src/ - main source. src/components/ - reusable UI components. src/pages/ - page-level components. src/stores/ - Zustand stores. src/types/ - TypeScript interfaces. src/lib/ - utilities. src/data/ - seed data. public/ - static assets.
